title: Bridge Essay: Body schema plasticity after stroke: Subjective and neurophysiological correlate

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Body schema plasticity after stroke: Subjective and neurophysiological correlates of the rubber hand illusion.**. Neuropsychologia.. PMID: 28077329. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2017.01.007. Stroke can lead to motor impairments that can affect the body structure and restraint mobility. We hypothesize that brain lesions and their motor sequelae can distort the body schema, asensorimotor map of body parts and elements in the peripersonal space through which human beings embody the reachable space and ready the body for forthcoming movements. Two main constructs have been identified in the embodiment mechanism: body-ownership, the sense that the body that one inhabits is his/her own,
